final:
module shift_register (  
    input obf_clk,  
    input load,  
    input shift,  
    input [15:0] data_in,  
    output reg [15:0] data_out  
);  

    always @(posedge obf_clk) begin  
        if (load) begin  
            data_out <= data_in;  
        end else if (shift) begin  
            data_out <= {1'b0, data_out[15:1]};  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
